title: Broken Access Control - Role Manipulation
goal: Access the admin panel without admin privileges.

whyVulnerable.explanation: The application trusted user-controlled input to determine authorization.
whyVulnerable.answer: Authorization must never depend on user input.

steps: User accessed panel as normal user.
attackFlow.answer: Changing role=user to role=admin bypassed authorization.

secureFix.explanation: Authorization should be verified using server-side user data.
secureFix.answer: Always validate permissions on server-side sessions.
